lines.english: Gathering it and collecting it, he fills his bags.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਉਸ ਤੇ ਡਾਰਿ ਅਵਰ ਕਉ ਦੀਨੑੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: prabh us te ddaar avar kau deenaee |1|
lines.english: But God takes it away from him, and gives it to another. ||1||
The mortal is like an unbaked clay pot in water;
Being fearless, he becomes unrestrained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਰਬਿ ਗਰਬਿ ਉਆਹੂ ਮਹਿ ਪਰੀਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: garab garab uaahoo meh pareea |1| rahaau |
lines.english: indulging in pride and egotism, he crumbles down and dissolves. ||1||Pause||
He does not think of the Creator, who is ever with him.
He raises armies, and collects arms.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਕਸਿਆ ਫੂਕ ਤ ਹੋਇ ਗਇਓ ਸੁਆਹਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: nikasiaa fook ta hoe geo suaahaa |2|
lines.english: But when the breath leaves him, he turns to ashes. ||2||
But, engrossed in attachment, the blind fool wastes away to death. ||3||
he is blessed with a great family of sons and daughters.
He has lofty palaces, mansions and queens,
elephants and pairs of horses, delighting the mind;
Enjoyments and pleasures are like just a dream.
The One who created him destroys him.
He alone is liberated, and possesses regal power and wealth,
The mortal is in love with this,
O Nanak, whom the Lord Master blesses with His Mercy. ||4||35||86||
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
But falling at the feet of the True Guru, he is saved. ||1||
It hangs around his neck, and does not leave him.
but the more he has, the more he longs for more.
I have renounced and discarded Maya, the Enticer of the world.
I have met the Absolute Lord, and congratulations are pouring in. ||1||Pause||
She is so beautiful, she captivates the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਟਿ ਘਾਟਿ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਬਨਿ ਬਨਿ ਜੋਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: baatt ghaatt grihi ban ban johai |
lines.english: On the road, and the beach, at home, in the forest and in the wilderness, she touches us.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਲਾਗੈ ਹੋਇ ਕੈ ਮੀਠੀ ॥
lines.translit: man tan laagai hoe kai meetthee |
lines.english: She seems so sweet to the mind and body.
But by Guru's Grace, I have seen her to be deceptive. ||2||
They do not spare even their fathers or mothers.
Her courtiers are also great deceivers.
They have enslaved their companions.
Now, my mind is filled with bliss;
my fear is gone, and the noose is cut away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਮੈ ਸਗਲੇ ਸਾਧੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te mai sagale saadhe |3|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, I have subjugated them all. ||3||
I came to dwell within my home in absolute peace. ||4||36||87||
Says Nanak, when I met the True Guru,
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
he surrenders to the Sweet Will of God.
Twenty-four hours a day, he knows the Lord to be near at hand;
The One Name is the Support of the Saints;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਇ ਰਹੇ ਸਭ ਕੀ ਪਗ ਛਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hoe rahe sabh kee pag chhaar |1|
lines.english: they remain the dust of the feet of all. ||1||
Listen, to the way of life of the Saints, O my Siblings of Destiny;

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਆ ਕੀ ਮਹਿਮਾ ਕਥਨੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: auaa kee mahimaa kathan na jaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: their praises cannot be described. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਤ੍ਰ ਸਤ੍ਰੁ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਏਕ ਸਮਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: mitr satru jaa kai ek samaanai |
lines.english: Friends and enemies are one and the same to them.
The Kirtan, the Praise of the Lord, the embodiment of bliss, is their rest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਜਾਨੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: prabh apune bin avar na jaanai |2|
lines.english: They know of no other than God. ||2||
Their occupation is the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
They are so brave; they are men of their word.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਦੂਰਿ ਕਰਨ ਜੀਅ ਕੇ ਦਾਤਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: dukh door karan jeea ke daataaraa |
lines.english: They dispel suffering; they are givers of the life of the soul.
They erase millions upon millions of sins.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਮੋਘ ਦਰਸੁ ਸਫਲ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਸੇਵ ॥
lines.translit: amogh daras safal jaa kee sev |
lines.english: Blessed is their Darshan, and fruitful is their service.
Their company is cherished even by the gods and the angels.
The Saints have enticed Maya herself. ||3||
O Lord, Treasure of Excellence, please bless me with the service of the Saints. ||4||37||88||
With his palms pressed together, Nanak offers his prayer:
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
The Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, is so very pure and sacred.
All peace and comforts are in the meditation of the One Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਧਰਮ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: sagal dharam har ke gun gaam |
lines.english: All righteous actions of Dharma are in the singing of the Lord's Glorious Praises.
